## Problem Statement

What problem does this feature solve? Who would benefit?

## Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like to see.

## Alternatives Considered

Any alternative solutions or workarounds you've considered.

## Additional Context

Screenshots, diagrams, code examples, or links to relevant documentation.

## Component

Which part of Blockify would this affect?

- [ ] Distillation Service
- [ ] Claude Code Skill
- [ ] Documentation
- [ ] API / Models
